column8: This app personalizes your app and advertising experience through couple of tools. They help us make this app free- improve it and fix all bugs. By consenting to this enhanced experience you will see content that is more relevant to you. Depending on your privacy settings- our partners and tools may collect and process personal data such as device identifiers- location data- and other demographic and interest data about you to provide personalized experience such as advertisement and recommendations. You can change your choice anytime in app settings.\n\nBy agreeing- you are confirming that you are over the age 16 and agree to process your personal data.
